race.comment: COLLATED (1) was okay first-up when sticking on soundly into a midfield finish over 1200m. Rises sharply to the mile second-up where he's a two-time winner. Draws to stalk the speed and keeps Murtagh. Bold showing anticipated. SPANGLED SIPPER (3) settled last here first-up over the 1400m and let down strongly once balancing up, savaging the line late. Draws to get back again but will appreciate the added trip and gets a key switch in Holder. Big threat. STOLEN KISS (5) is on the quick back-up after a forgiving run in town on the weekend. Drawn sticky again but with a bit of luck in-running she has the ability to give this a big shake. ON ANY TUESDAY (8) showed good tactical speed over this trip last start at HQ but just found two better late. Is sure to hunt the front again and give plenty of cheek.
